title: The insane engineering of Deepseek V4
summary: Deepseek V4 is an LLM featuring a 1M context window with hybrid attention mechanisms designed for efficiency. The model uses techniques like CSA, HCA, sliding window attention, and anticipatory routing to achieve SOTA results while maintaining computational efficiency.
